note: Contract-keyed deep capture (056-AT-SPEC). One-time build-time fetch; CI never refetches (offline determinism) — ongoing freshness is the watcher's job via the surface registry. Tier-2 conventions per 052-AT-SPEC: replace-in-place, lineage recorded (snapshot-updated in specs/lineage/log.jsonl), the differ/extractor reads and never writes here.

files.version_basis: modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/versioning declares 2025-11-25 the CURRENT protocol revision (checked at fetch time); schema/ in the modelcontextprotocol repo lists 2024-11-05, 2025-03-26, 2025-06-18, 2025-11-25, draft

files.surface_note: Not yet a registered surface in specs/upstream-surface-registry.v1.json (the registry's mcp-config surfaces are mcp-schema-ts / mcp-spec-docs / mcp-releases). Registering this page (registry row + spec-drift-check.sh SOURCES + extractor, per 050-AT-SPEC change discipline) is a tracked follow-up; until then this vendor-meta entry is its provenance record.
